calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-06-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-06-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Prov-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Kathy Kollehner.
Arthur Shwachman, Esq. for Plaintiff: Citi Bank (South Dakota), N.A.
No appearance by the Defendant: Michelle R. Benoit.
Declaration in lieu of direct testimony of Nick Petsche, presented in open court.
After considering the declaration presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant for money judgment of pricipal in the amount of $15,543.00 and $261.50 in Cost, for a total of $15,804.50
Judgment signed in open court.
